successCriteria.description: src/shared/types/leave.types.ts exports LeaveType string enum with exactly three values: ANNUAL, SICK, EMERGENCY
src/shared/types/leave.types.ts exports LeaveStatus string enum with exactly four values: PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED
tests/unit/shared/types/leave.types.test.ts contains Jest unit tests that verify all 3 LeaveType values and all 4 LeaveStatus values are defined and correct
No files outside the two specified paths (src/shared/types/leave.types.ts and tests/unit/shared/types/leave.types.test.ts) are created or modified

constraints: Enums must use TypeScript string enum syntax (e.g., ANNUAL = 'ANNUAL') — consistent with the existing codebase pattern in src/shared/types/leave.types.ts
The file src/shared/types/leave.types.ts must be the single canonical source for LeaveType and LeaveStatus — no duplicate definitions in other modules
Jest test file must use ts-jest (as declared in devDependencies) and follow the project's existing test conventions (describe/it blocks, expect assertions)
TypeScript strict mode is enabled (tsconfig.json: "strict": true) — all code must compile under strict null checks and no implicit any
No use of `any` type — use `unknown` with type guards if needed (HARNESS.json constraint no-any, severity: high)
outOfScope: Phase 2: Employee module — model, repository, service (src/modules/employee/)
Phase 3: Policy module — model, repository, service (src/modules/policy/)
Phase 4: Balance module — model, repository, service (src/modules/balance/)
Phase 5: Notification module — model, repository, service (src/modules/notification/)
Phase 6: Leave module — model and repository (src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts, leave.repository.ts)
Phase 7: Leave module — service with workflow orchestration (src/modules/leave/leave.service.ts)
Phase 8: Leave module — Zod validation schemas (src/modules/leave/leave.validation.ts)
Phase 10: Leave module — Fastify routes and app registration (src/modules/leave/leave.routes.ts, src/app.ts modification)

ambiguities.description: The intent says "Create src/shared/types/leave.types.ts" but the file already exists with the exact specified content. The phase may already be complete — the implementation should verify the existing file matches the spec rather than blindly overwriting.
options: Overwrite the existing file with identical content (idempotent)
Verify the existing file matches the spec and skip creation if it does
Fail if the file already exists to avoid unintended overwrites
